blockingIssues.description: lib/exhaust.ml only checked exhaustiveness when the enum name could be recovered from the scrutinee or a qualified arm pattern, so some non-exhaustive enum matches were silently skipped instead of reporting missing variants.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reinforce in compiler-worker guidance that semantic features must add at least one negative regression exercising the feature through authoritative typed information rather than only surface-syntax-positive cases.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The original phase-6 feature added only positive/qualified-pattern coverage; later fix features were required to catch scrutinee-type-driven and whole-expression enum cases that the initial implementation skipped.
